name: APPOINTMENT_REMINDER
template: Dear {{patientName}}, this is a reminder for your appointment with Dr. {{doctorName}} on {{date}} at {{time}}. Please arrive 15 minutes early. - PIBS Hospital

name: LAB_RESULT_READY
template: Dear {{patientName}}, your laboratory results are now available. Please visit the hospital or check your patient portal. - PIBS Hospital

name: BILL_READY
template: Dear {{patientName}}, your bill ({{billNo}}) of {{amount}} is ready for payment. - PIBS Hospital

name: PRESCRIPTION_READY
template: Dear {{patientName}}, your prescription is ready for pickup at our pharmacy. - PIBS Hospital

name: APPOINTMENT_CONFIRMED
template: Dear {{patientName}}, your appointment with Dr. {{doctorName}} on {{date}} has been confirmed. Room code: {{roomCode}}. - PIBS Hospital
